title: 联系家人与来客周
summary: 本周会认识新字 爸、打、电、话、大，再复习 客、杯、爱。我们会围绕打电话、接待客人和家庭沟通，学习怎样联系家人、说明情况和礼貌招呼。

char_cards.sentence_pinyin: wǒ men xué xí “ bà bà ”。
wǒ men xué xí “ dǎ diàn huà ”。

word_pronunciation_hints: 电子邮件: diàn zǐ yóu jiàn
char_cards.sentence_pinyin: wǒ men xué xí “ dǎ diàn huà ”。
wǒ men xué xí “ dǎ diàn huà ”。

char_cards.meaning: big; huge; large; major; great; wide; deep; oldest; eldest

char_cards.sentence_pinyin: wǒ men xué xí “ bù kè qì ”。
wǒ men xué xí “ bēi zǐ ”。

char_cards.meaning: to love; affection; to be fond of; to like

sentences.pinyin_text: wǒ xiǎng gěi bà bà dǎ diàn huà。
kè rén dào le， qǐng xiān ná bēi zǐ。
dà jiā zài mén kǒu shuō huà。
bà bà zhèng zài jiē diàn huà。

story.title: 联系爸爸
story.text: 放学后，一个学生想晚一点回家，先用电话联系爸爸。
story.pinyin_text: fàng xué hòu， yī gè xué shēng xiǎng wǎn yī diǎn huí jiā， xiān yòng diàn huà lián xì bà bà。
story.dialogue_pinyin: wǒ xiǎng gěi bà bà dǎ diàn huà。
story.image_prompt:
Create a storybook-style learning illustration for school-age Chinese learners.
Style baseline: storybook illustration, soft shapes, warm light, expressive characters.
Scene goal: 放学后，一个学生想晚一点回家，先用电话联系爸爸。
Scene type: 家庭时刻
Location: 温暖真实的家庭空间
Focus characters: 爸、打、话
Focus words: 打电话、爸爸
Visual direction:
- Use soft shapes, warm light, expressive characters, and an age-appropriate atmosphere for learners around ages 9-13.
- Build a grounded educational scene connected to real Chinese learning moments such as classroom discussion, home routines, reading, greeting, helping, planning, travel, or going out.
- Include meaningful props related to Chinese learning, such as books, chalkboard, toys, flowers, bags, tables, cups, or other scene-appropriate objects.
- Keep the layout clean and stable, suitable for a modern learning page or printable study material.
Composition:
- One clear main action, readable background, strong focal point, and enough empty space for later educational text layout.
- Make the illustration feel polished, warm, and visually consistent with the Fun Hanzi style, without looking like preschool material.
IMPORTANT:
- Do NOT generate any Chinese characters, pinyin, letters, or text in the image.
- Leave empty space where educational text can be added later.
- Hanzi and pinyin planning notes belong in the separate text layout, not inside the image.
- If any visible text is produced by mistake, it must be treated as an error and regenerated.
story.video_prompt:
Create an educational micro-story video for school-age Chinese learners.
Style baseline: 10-15 second school-age micro-story clip, gentle camera move, warm realistic lighting, clear staging, simple shot rhythm, vivid everyday setting.
Scene title: 联系爸爸
Learning goal: 放学后，一个学生想晚一点回家，先用电话联系爸爸。
Real-life setting: 家庭时刻 / 温暖真实的家庭空间
Character relationship: 学生和家人围绕生活安排、礼貌表达或简单分工进行互动
Focus characters: 爸、打、话
Focus words: 打电话、爸爸
Fixed spoken line: 我想给爸爸打电话。
Reference pinyin for production only: wǒ xiǎng gěi bà bà dǎ diàn huà。
Story direction: Build a school-age learning micro-story instead of a dry teaching clip. Use a believable 家庭时刻 in 温暖真实的家庭空间. Show 学生和家人围绕生活安排、礼貌表达或简单分工进行互动. Let 打电话、爸爸 and the focus characters 爸、打、话 appear through a tiny real-life event. The story must contain a setup, a small task or question, a response, and a warm ending. Keep the tone suitable for learners around ages 9-13, a little more mature and grounded than preschool material. Make the spoken line feel natural and land clearly on “我想给爸爸打电话。”.
Story structure:
- Opening: establish a real place and a clear student activity.
- Middle beat: introduce one small task, question, or discovery connected to the target words.
- Speaking beat: let the character say the fixed line naturally in context.
- Ending: give a warm response or tiny success moment.
Visual direction:
- Keep the action grounded in family life, classroom life, going out, greeting, helping, reading, planning, traveling, or welcoming someone.
- Use clear staging, readable props, gentle motion, and one main action per shot.
- Keep the same characters, costume, and mood consistent with the matching image.
Text and subtitle rules:
- Reference these exact pinyin spellings for production planning and script checking only: 爸 -> bà; 打 -> dǎ; 话 -> huà. Keep these exact Hanzi+pinyin pairs in your notes: 爸 bà | 打 dǎ | 话 huà.
- Use the fixed spoken line provided in the script. Reference pinyin for production only: wǒ xiǎng gěi bà bà dǎ diàn huà。. Do not generate pinyin subtitles inside the video; the learning page will show the exact teaching pinyin separately.
- If text appears on screen, prefer Hanzi only and avoid auto-generated pinyin subtitles.
- Hanzi writing and pinyin spelling must be absolutely correct; do not invent, simplify, misspell, or place tone marks on the wrong vowel.
Quality bar:
- Avoid flashcard-style pointing at words.
- Avoid empty backgrounds or generic stock actions.
- Make the moment feel believable, warm, story-led, and useful for a child learner.
story.video_script:
场景：联系爸爸
视频类型：家庭时刻
真实场合：温暖真实的家庭空间
人物关系：学生和家人围绕生活安排、礼貌表达或简单分工进行互动
固定台词：我想给爸爸打电话。
参考拼音：wǒ xiǎng gěi bà bà dǎ diàn huà。
目标字：爸、打、话
剧情结构：先交代一个真实小场景，再出现一个小问题或小任务，接着通过人物互动自然说出台词，最后温暖收尾。
镜头1：建立真实场景，让学生一眼看懂人物在做什么，并为“我想给爸爸打电话。”做铺垫。
镜头2：出现一个具体动作或小问题，把目标字 爸、打、话 藏在物件、地点、任务或人物反应里，不要像生硬教学演示。
镜头3：角色在情境里自然说出固定台词“我想给爸爸打电话。”，嘴型清楚，情绪真实，动作和台词有关联。
镜头4：给出回应或结果，例如同学反馈、老师确认、家人回应、任务完成，让学习者感觉这个句子在真实生活里有用。
镜头5：收尾停留 1-2 秒，保持画面温暖、真实、易懂，但不要过于幼态。
字幕策略：视频里不强制加入拼音字幕，拼音会由学习页面单独展示；如需字幕，只保留汉字即可。
story.image_text_layout:
【标题】
我想给爸爸打电话。
wǒ xiǎng gěi bà bà dǎ diàn huà。

【重点字】
爸
bà
打
dǎ
话
huà

【词语】
打电话
爸爸

【教学标签】
爸 bà | 打 dǎ | 话 huà

story.title: 客人到了
story.text: 晚上家里来了客人，大家正在门口打招呼，桌上已经放好了杯子。
story.pinyin_text: wǎn shàng jiā lǐ lái le kè rén， dà jiā zhèng zài mén kǒu dǎ zhāo hū， zhuō shàng yǐ jīng fàng hǎo le bēi zǐ。
story.dialogue_pinyin: kè rén dào le， qǐng xiān ná bēi zǐ。

story.title: 说清安排
story.text: 爸爸接完电话后，和家人一起确认晚上的安排，大家说话很清楚。
story.pinyin_text: bà bà jiē wán diàn huà hòu， hé jiā rén yī qǐ què rèn wǎn shàng de ān pái， dà jiā shuō huà hěn qīng chǔ。
story.dialogue_pinyin: dà jiā zài mén kǒu shuō huà。

video_storyboard.script:
场景：联系爸爸
视频类型：家庭时刻
真实场合：温暖真实的家庭空间
人物关系：学生和家人围绕生活安排、礼貌表达或简单分工进行互动
固定台词：我想给爸爸打电话。
参考拼音：wǒ xiǎng gěi bà bà dǎ diàn huà。
目标字：爸、打、话
剧情结构：先交代一个真实小场景，再出现一个小问题或小任务，接着通过人物互动自然说出台词，最后温暖收尾。
镜头1：建立真实场景，让学生一眼看懂人物在做什么，并为“我想给爸爸打电话。”做铺垫。
镜头2：出现一个具体动作或小问题，把目标字 爸、打、话 藏在物件、地点、任务或人物反应里，不要像生硬教学演示。
镜头3：角色在情境里自然说出固定台词“我想给爸爸打电话。”，嘴型清楚，情绪真实，动作和台词有关联。
镜头4：给出回应或结果，例如同学反馈、老师确认、家人回应、任务完成，让学习者感觉这个句子在真实生活里有用。
镜头5：收尾停留 1-2 秒，保持画面温暖、真实、易懂，但不要过于幼态。
字幕策略：视频里不强制加入拼音字幕，拼音会由学习页面单独展示；如需字幕，只保留汉字即可。

audio_tasks.text: 放学后，一个学生想晚一点回家，先用电话联系爸爸。
晚上家里来了客人，大家正在门口打招呼，桌上已经放好了杯子。
爸爸接完电话后，和家人一起确认晚上的安排，大家说话很清楚。
